articles.title: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Priority Date Update
articles.what_this_means: EB-2 India priority date advanced to September 15, 2013 in March 2026, moving eligible applicants closer to I-485 filing. Check if your priority date is current and begin green card application prep now. USCIS processing typically takes 12–24 months post-filing.

articles.title: RR & CSK Revamped for 2026: IPL Teams Aim for Redemption
articles.what_this_means: After finishing dead last in IPL 2025, Rajasthan Royals and Chennai Super Kings have completely overhauled their squads for 2026. Both franchises made bold personnel changes, focusing on youth, explosive batting, and improved bowling—a clear signal they're determined to bounce back. Fans in the US can watch all their matches on ESPN+ during early morning IST time slots.

articles.title: Cameron Green Batter-Only at KKR: IPL 2025 Shake-Up
articles.what_this_means: Cameron Green will bat-only for KKR in IPL 2025, with Cricket Australia confirming the franchise knew this when signing him. While KKR captain Rahane has concerns, the move could strengthen their batting lineup. US-based India cricket fans can catch the action via Willow TV or ESPN+.

articles.title: Hardik Wants Shardul at MI Forever: IPL 2025 Game-Changer
articles.what_this_means: After six IPL franchises, Shardul Thakur finally found home at Mumbai Indians with a match-winning three-wicket haul. Captain Hardik Pandya publicly backed him to stay 'for the rest of your career'—a major vote of confidence that could reshape India cricket's all-rounder options for upcoming Test series.

articles.title: Salman Khan New Movie 2026: Vamshi Paidipally Action Drama
articles.what_this_means: Salman Khan is joining National Award director Vamshi Paidipally and producer Dil Raju for a high-octane action drama shooting April 2026—their first collaboration. This is a major new Bollywood movie for 2026 that should eventually stream on Netflix or Prime Video in the US after its theatrical run.

articles.title: Qualified Health's $125M AI Platform: What It Means for Your Tech Career
articles.what_this_means: Qualified Health's $125M funding round signals that healthcare AI is moving from experimental to critical infrastructure. For Indian software engineers, this means new hiring in machine learning and backend roles with better visa sponsorship, higher salaries ($180K-$240K), and more job stability than consumer tech. Healthcare AI is less saturated than general AI—and companies like Qualified Health are actively recruiting now.

articles.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Gets Fixed: Mirror Goof Corrected in New 2025 Prints
articles.what_this_means: Dhurandhar The Revenge, Ranveer Singh's revenge thriller directed by Aditya Dhar, has been corrected with revised prints after a minor mirror continuity goof was discovered. The film is still in select US theaters and will likely stream on Prime Video or Disney+ Hotstar within 6-8 weeks. Our verdict: worth watching for fans of intelligent action thrillers.
